description: MyFitnessPal is a nutrition and fitness tracking service for logging food, exercise, calories, and related health goals. It provides apps and partner integrations around user diet and activity data.
summary: MyFitnessPal exposes a private REST API for approved developers (public docs page only; no public spec or auth mechanics published) and a catalog-listed MCP endpoint at https://mcp.myfitnesspal.com/mcp that appears to require no credential.
